author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 behavioral spec for plugins + skills (loader, marketplace, MCP/LSP integration, autoupdate, blocklist) — read CC pluginLoader.ts (~3302), marketplaceManager.ts (~2643), installedPluginsManager.ts (~1268). Not addressable in this cleanup session: external-source research over very large CC files. Phase 2 implementations tracked under #652 (autoupdate), #654 (mcp plugin integration), #655 (lsp plugin integration), #656 (zipCache offline distribution), #658 (delisting detection), #660 (skill frontmatter parity), #661 (project-dirs-up-to-home discovery), #664 (managed skills layer), #665 (conditional skills). Owner-level external research.
